# Global Materials Regenerator

Rebuild the master materials list from YAML.

## Tasks

1. AGGREGATE
- All components
- All hardware
- All consumables

2. NORMALIZE
- Remove duplicates
- Use consistent labels

3. GENERATE
/docs/materials/index.md

## Format
- Flat list (no variants)
- Clean grouping by type

## VALIDATION
- No missing entries
- No duplicates
- Naming consistency maintained

## Constraints
- Do NOT invent materials
- Do NOT omit entries
